## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing behavior it affects.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for public API or provider changes.
- [ ] Optional dependencies remain behind the correct extras.
- [ ] `ruff`, `mypy`, and `pytest` pass locally or in CI.

## Notes for reviewers

Mention risks, compatibility concerns, or follow-up work.
